intro: Afroligusticum elgonense, also known as Elgon Ligusticum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The bioactive constituents of Afroligusticum elgonense include sesquiterpene lactones, volatile oils, and other phytochemicals that contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems.
